headline: Packaging, Forest Products Face Lackluster Demand, Weak Volumes, BofA Says
summary: Packaging and forest products companies face lackluster demand and weak volumes outside beverage can

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Avery Dennison, Raises Price Target to $210
summary: B of A Securities  analyst George Staphos   maintains Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY) with a Buy and raises the price target from $202 to $210.
